title: neobartsia strigosa
intro: Neobartsia strigosa is a flowering plant species in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as the 'strigose beardtongue'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Neobartsia strigosa has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Neobartsia strigosa can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts for potential medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
